clusters.justification: These terms map onto cortico-limbic and somatic processing networks that subserve the generation, regulation, and autonomic mapping of valenced states and physiological arousal.
These terms co-activate within mesolimbic and orbitofrontal circuitry underlying reward processing, incentive salience, and cost-benefit outcome evaluation.
These terms converge functionally within cortical midline and temporoparietal structures to support overarching internal representations of the self, others, and interpersonal constructs.
